# `StartRasterChain`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128  
**Parameters:** `p,b,n`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>StartRasterChain is basically a shortcut to jumpstart rasters, and typing
<code>
StartRasterChain(Raster1(), rasterLine, @useKernal);
</code>
is identical to
<code>
PreventIRQ();
DisableCIAInterrupts();

RasterIRQ(Raster1(),rasterLine,@useKernal);
EnableRasterIRQ();

enableirq();

</code>


</div>
